name: Vitamin B12 sensor (cobalamin riboswitch + CRISPRa)
shortDescription: Detects vitamin B12 (cobalamin) in food and the gut. The natural cobalamin riboswitch gates a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in the gut-persistent probiotic Lactiplantibacillus plantarum.

input.detects: Cobalamin in food, supplements, and the gut
input.operatingRange: Cobalamin riboswitches respond at nM-µM B12

sensing.sensorMechanism: The natural cobalamin (B12) riboswitch binds adenosylcobalamin and modulates downstream expression.
sensing.signalFlow: B12 -> cobalamin riboswitch gates sgRNA expression -> dCas9-activator amplifies a fluorescent reporter (CRISPRa) -> fluorescence reports B12 level.

parts.name: Cobalamin (B12) riboswitch
parts.notes: Widespread B12-binding RNA element; place upstream of the sgRNA.

parts.name: sgRNA (riboswitch-controlled)
parts.source: designed for CRISPRa upstream of a weak promoter

parts.name: dCas9-ω activator
parts.source: CRISPRa (Bikard et al. 2013); CRISPRi in lactobacilli

performance.notes: The cobalamin riboswitch is a well-characterised natural B12 sensor; integrated CRISPRa device is a design template. Relevant to food fortification and B12-deficiency contexts.

safety.biocontainment: Auxotrophy (alr/dapA) and food-grade containment; GRAS probiotic host.
safety.notes: GRAS, gut-persistent probiotic; suited to food and ingestible sensing.

buildSteps.title: Design riboswitch-sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Place the cobalamin riboswitch 5' of the sgRNA; design the CRISPRa spacer.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: P11 -> riboswitch -> sgRNA. TU2: dCas9-omega. TU3: weak promoter -> mCherry. pSIP vectors.

buildSteps.title: Expose to sample
buildSteps.description: Add food/gut sample + B12 standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining the natural cobalamin riboswitch with L. plantarum CRISPRa
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
